advancedModeHint: Select cells from the grid to create custom tasks
elapsedHint: Total project duration in working days
appendToExisting: Project {{projectKey}} already exists. Append {{taskCount}} new tasks?
splitDragHint: Drag dividers on the bar or edit values below
splitNormalizeTooltip: Proportionally scale all values to match the exact total
splitFillGapTooltip: Assign the remaining to this part
budgetCoverageOk: 100% coverage: tasks cover the full estimate ({{total}}{{unit}})
budgetCoverageWarning: {{coverage}}% coverage: tasks cover {{actual}}{{unit}} out of {{expected}}{{unit}} of the estimate
finalConfirmMessage: You are about to convert the estimate into a project with {{taskCount}} tasks. Proceed?
finalConfirmBudgetWarning: Warning: tasks cover only {{coverage}}% of the estimated budget.
duplicateKeyWarning: Code {{projectKey}} is already in use. Tasks will be appended to the existing project.
deletedKeyError: Code {{projectKey}} belongs to a deleted project and cannot be reused.
